source_pr.title: *: disable parallel to avoid data race when test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?


Problem Summary:

statistics: disable parallel to avoid data race when test.

many tests will change ```domain.RunAutoAnalyze``` that lead to a data race.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: *: disable parallel to avoid data race when test
failure_signature: *: disable parallel to avoid data race when test
root_cause_explanation: The tests were flaky due to a concurrency/data-race risk: multiple tests were mutating shared global state (e.g. `domain.RunAutoAnalyze`) while running in parallel. This PR stabilizes them by disabling parallel execution / moving affected tests into serial test suites.
fix_pattern: Disable `t.Parallel()` / move tests to serial suites because tests mutate global `domain.RunAutoAnalyze`, which can race when run in parallel.

evidence: evidence: *: disable parallel to avoid data race when test

files: infoschema/perfschema/tables_serial_test.go, infoschema/perfschema/tables_test.go, statistics/handle/ddl_serial_test.go, statistics/handle/dump_serial_test.go, statistics/handle/gc_serial_test.go, statistics/handle/handle_test.go, statistics/selectivity_serial_test.go, statistics/selectivity_test.go
